title: OAR benchmark recorded aggregate results
description: Aggregate-level (never per-card) recorded results for one v0 domain pack: either an ablation-arms batch (AI supply chain -- design doc Sec 5's discipline curve) or a single funnel-stage run (uranium -- design doc Sec 4's H3 clause (c) portability demo). No per-card content: v0 ships the schema + arm/funnel RESULTS as fixtures only, per the design doc's v0 scope note.

reference_arm.description: Name of the arm (must appear in arms[]) that is the disciplined reference OAR is measured against.

funnel.description: Stage counts for a single (non-ablated) funnel run -- sourced/gate/triage/bear-case/adjudicated counts. Shape mirrors schemas/run_manifest.schema.json's 'funnel' block.

admission_rate.description: Admission rate(s) computed off the funnel counts (e.g. of_sourced, of_unique_symbols, of_gate_pass).

arm.description: Machine name of the arm, e.g. 'full_pipeline'.

label.description: Human label, e.g. the ablation removed.

total.description: Candidate-set size this arm was scored on (the fixed admission budget / same-set requirement -- design doc Sec 5).

admitted.description: Admit count for a single-replicate arm.

admitted_replicates.description: Per-replicate admit counts for a multi-replicate arm.

ablates.description: Which single discipline this arm removes; null for the ungated screener and the full pipeline.
